text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

51 
CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 
LABEL: 
Claim Site Neutral Payment Based on IPPS Amount 
DESCRIPTION: Under the Long-Term Care Hospital (LTCH) Prospective Payment System (PPS), the payment amount 
based on the Inpatient Prospective Payment (IPPS) comparable amount. This amount does not include 
any applicable outlier payment amount. 
SHORT NAME: CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 
LONG NAME:
